creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks to an interesting addition from bapt@ to Mk/Uses/compiler.mk we
are now able to simplify ports Makefiles, if they have to use C++11 [1].
(Hope, I understand this change the right way.)

So we can now use "USES=compiler:gcc-c++11-lib" for graphics/vigra. It
seems to work fine so far.


Furthermore I forgot to mention two further details in the list of
changes of the original PR:

- support STAGING
- tested on RedPorts (before r350623)


[1]  http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=350623
